blockingIssues.description: The nesting suite still recurses through mocked bridge contexts instead of invoking the real nested `agent` command from a scoop bash/tool path, so the key nested execution behaviors remain unproven.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Keep at least one nesting scenario on the real `ScoopContext` path and drive the inner invocation through the `agent` supplemental command from a scoop.

blockingIssues.description: The VAL-NEST-015 cone-tool counter assertion is detached from the real bridge/tool path, so zero counters are not meaningful evidence that nested runs bypass `scoop_scoop`/`feed_scoop`.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Instrument the actual nested execution surface that would hit cone-only scoop tools instead of a standalone local tool array.

blockingIssues.description: The parent-abort case only rejects a mocked `prompt()` promise; it does not exercise a real bridge/orchestrator teardown path, and current orchestrator shutdown does not appear to stop bridge-owned contexts.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Wire a real abort/shutdown path for bridge-spawned contexts and replace the mocked rejection with a real `ScoopContext` abort test.

blockingIssues.description: The pipeline/conjunction rejection test cannot catch partial pre-rejection execution because every segment before the disallowed `rm` is read-only.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Use a rejected line with an earlier write-capable or otherwise observable side effect and assert that no earlier segment ran.

blockingIssues.description: Baseline verification does not include the required pre-feature `npm run build`, so VAL-CI-010 is not fully evidenced.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Re-run the baseline chain on the pre-feature commit including `npm run build` and capture the result.

blockingIssues.description: The required fresh/no-provider live check was skipped and replaced with an unknown-model probe, which exercises a different failure path than VAL-LIVE-010.
blockingIssues.suggestedFix: Repeat live validation in a clean no-provider state and capture the real `agent . "*" "say hello"` missing-provider behavior.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented reliable dev-server shell liveness probes in `.factory/library/environment.md` (`Accept: text/html` on `/` or `/api/runtime-config`) so workers can avoid false-negative raw curl checks.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add the full `npm run build` gate and the requirement to rerun the same gate set on the baseline commit to the worker checklist for CI verification features.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `ci-gates-verification` review found the worker omitted baseline `npm run build` evidence while otherwise following mission guidance, because the checklist did not spell out that requirement.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify how workers must record a skipped feature-listed manual/CDP verification step when the skill allows it to be optional; the handoff should explicitly note the omission in `whatWasLeftUndone` or equivalent.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `error-and-abort-hardening` review found a feature-listed manual smoke step was omitted while the handoff still reported `whatWasLeftUndone: ""` and `followedProcedure: true`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Replace raw `curl -sf http://localhost:5710` health checks with an HTML-accepting probe or `/api/runtime-config` for dev-server liveness checks.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The `live-browser-validation` review found raw root curls can false-negative in dev mode because the HTML fallback requires `Accept: text/html`, leading to unnecessary debugging during live validation.

rejectedObservations.observation: Change the existing `dev` service healthcheck in `.factory/services.yaml` away from a raw root curl probe.
rejectedObservations.reason: Not applied in this pass because the scrutiny workflow limits `services.yaml` edits to additive changes; the reliable liveness workaround was documented in `.factory/library/environment.md` instead.

rejectedObservations.observation: Document a non-destructive procedure for validating both the no-provider and provider-configured live states in one run.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as ambiguous because the reviews identified the gap but did not establish a proven, repeatable procedure to document.

rejectedObservations.observation: Update this mission's feature metadata that still describes ESLint as a CI gate.
rejectedObservations.reason: Rejected as mission-specific/ambiguous for this validator pass; the contract and shared library already correctly state that Prettier is the actual lint gate.
